name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a wooden seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1993-08-23. It is located in Nishikata-machi Manako, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a statue of Fudō Myōō associated with the founder of Nijōin. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1995-07-20. It is located at Nijōzan in Nishikata-machi Honjō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Standing Statue of the Thousand-Armed Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a standing statue of the Thousand-Armed Kannon (Senju Kanzeon). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1995-11-30. It is located in Nishikata-machi Manako, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, sculpture: the front-canopy (kōhai) carvings of Fukushōji Temple. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2007-03-09. It is located in Nishikata-machi Moto, Tochigi City.

name_en: Bronze Standing Statue of Amida Buddha
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2015-03-23. It is located in Tsuga-machi Ienaka, Tochigi City.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, sculpture: a wooden standing statue of Yakushi Nyorai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2016-08-01. It is located in Tsuga-machi Tomibari, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a craft object: the suit of armor (gusoku) worn by Minagawa Hiroteru. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Minagawa Jōnai-machi, Tochigi City.
A tangible cultural property, a craft object: the bell (kane) of Byōdōan. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Asahi-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Cast Bronze Seated Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a craft object: a cast bronze seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1984-03-30. It is located in Ōtsuka-chō, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a craft object: a standing statue of Yakushi Nyorai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-04-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Fujioka, within the Fujioka History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

name_en: Gilt-Bronze Standing Statue of the Infant Shakyamuni
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a craft object: a gilt-bronze standing statue of the newborn Shakyamuni Buddha. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1993-03-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Kō, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a craft object: a great Buddha (daibutsu) statue. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1972-04-01. It is located in Iwafune-machi Shizu, Tochigi City.
A tangible cultural property, a craft object: a hand censer (tekōro). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1972-04-01. It is located in Iwafune-machi Onodera, Tochigi City.
A tangible cultural property, a craft object: a lantern (tōrō). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1972-04-01. It is located in Iwafune-machi Shizu, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, calligraphy: the framed tablet (hengaku) of the Fudō hall. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Asahi-chō, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Jutoku Gakkō Kibori Hengaku to Sho
name_en: Wooden Tablet and Calligraphy of Jutoku School
description_en: A tangible cultural property, calligraphy: a carved wooden tablet and calligraphy of the Jutoku school. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Fukiage-chō, Tochigi City.
A tangible cultural property, calligraphy: a record of entering nirvana (nyūjōki). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Jōnai-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Copy of the Minagawa Hirokatsu Appointment Letter
description_en: A tangible cultural property, calligraphy: a copy of an official appointment letter (kantojō) of Minagawa Hirokatsu. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1997-02-28. It is located in Nishikata-machi Manako, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an old document: a letter of Tokugawa Ieyasu in folded (origami) format. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1968-02-16. It is located in Minagawa Jōnai-machi, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an old document: a letter of Tenkai in folded (origami) format. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1968-02-16. It is located in Jōnai-chō, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a dancing haniwa figure. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Minagawa Jōnai-machi, within the Minagawa Community Center, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a jar used as an ossuary vessel (kotsuzōki). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Yamato-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Stone Tools Excavated from the Nagakura Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: stone tools excavated from the Nagakura site. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1965-03-20. It is located in Ōkubo-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Grave of Honda Tadazumi, Governor of Ōsumi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: the grave of Honda Tadazumi, Governor of Ōsumi. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Enomoto, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: the grave known as Otora-sama. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: the grave of Aoki Santarō Toshinaga. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Shimotakashima, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Hōin Shunkō no Haka (Gyakushu Mei no Bohi)
name_en: Grave of Hōin Shunkō (Pre-Death Inscription Tombstone)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: the grave of Hōin Shunkō, a tombstone bearing a pre-death (gyakushu) inscription. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-09-21. It is located in Ōhira-machi Shimotakashima, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a five-ring stone pagoda (gorintō). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-23. It is located in Ōhira-machi Shimominagawa, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Shimominagawa Masakado Reijin Kofun Shutsudo Ibutsu
name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Shimominagawa Masakado Reijin Tumulus
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: objects excavated from the Masakado Reijin tumulus at Shimominagawa. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-23. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

name_en: Grave of Kondō Tsunahide, Governor of Dewa
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: the grave of Kondō Tsunahide, Governor of Dewa. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1989-09-20. It is located in Ōhira-machi Enomoto, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Sannōji Ōmasuzuka Kofun Shutsudo Ibutsu Ikkatsu Shiryō
name_en: Set of Artifacts Excavated from the Sannōji Ōmasuzuka Tumulus
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a set of objects excavated from the Sannōji Ōmasuzuka tumulus. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1993-11-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Fujioka, within the Fujioka History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a jar coffin (kamekan) and its lid. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1994-09-07. It is located in Nishikata-machi Manako, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a Kongō Dōji tiered stone pagoda (sōtō). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2000-12-21. It is located in Nishikata-machi Kanai, Tochigi City.

name_en: Five-Ring Pagoda of Fujita Nobuyoshi, Governor of Noto
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: the five-ring pagoda (gorintō) of Fujita Nobuyoshi, Governor of Noto. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2004-09-10. It is located in Nishikata-machi Moto, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: a stone stupa slab (itabi). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1972-04-01. It is located in Iwafune-machi Onodera, Tochigi City.

name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Ono Sune Tumulus Group
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an archaeological artifact: objects excavated from the Ono Sune tumulus group. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1991-08-01. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a ridge tablet (munafuda) of Shinmeigū Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1968-02-16. It is located in Asahi-chō, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: the Tochigi town road marker (dōro genpyō). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2005-02-18. It is located in Yamato-chō, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: the portable shrine (mikoshi) of Ushiku. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1985-12-12. It is located in Ōhira-machi Ushiku, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: the portable shrine (mikoshi) of Kurai. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1985-12-12. It is located in Ōhira-machi Kurai, Tochigi City.
